Data entry & reporting AI Agent

An agent that pulls data from across your tools, cleans and structures it, and delivers accurate reports on a schedule — so your team spends time on decisions, not spreadsheets.

Book a free call

20-minute call · Live in days

10+ hours·typically saved per week on manual data workAlways current·reports delivered automatically on your scheduleDays, not months·from brief to a live reporting agent

What it does

An AI data entry and reporting agent connects to the tools your business already uses — your CRM, e-commerce platform, ad accounts, spreadsheets, and more — pulls the relevant data on a schedule, cleans and structures it, and generates formatted reports ready to share with your team or clients.

It's built for teams drowning in manual data work: agency owners compiling client reports, operations teams tracking KPIs across multiple platforms, or founders who want a weekly dashboard without hiring a data analyst. The agent does the extraction, transformation, and formatting automatically, so reporting is always up to date and never late.

Use cases

What your data entry & reporting agent handles

Automated data extraction

Pulls data from your CRM, ad platforms, e-commerce store, and spreadsheets on a set schedule.

Data cleaning & structuring

Normalises, deduplicates, and formats raw data so it's ready for analysis without manual cleanup.

Report generation

Produces formatted, ready-to-share reports — weekly summaries, monthly dashboards, client reports.

Multi-source consolidation

Combines data from different tools into a single view — no more copying between platforms.

Scheduled delivery

Sends reports to your inbox, Slack, or Google Drive automatically at the cadence you set.

Data entry automation

Moves structured data between systems — from forms to CRM, from orders to spreadsheets — without manual copying.

How we build it

From brief to live agent — done for you

01

Discovery

You walk us through your current reporting workflow and the data sources you use — in one short call.

02

Build & integrate

We connect the agent to your tools and configure the data extraction, transformation, and report templates.

03

Deploy & host

The agent runs on a schedule on our infrastructure, pulling, processing, and delivering reports automatically.

04

Monitor & improve

We monitor data quality, add new sources as needed, and refine reports as your business evolves.

Why build it with us

You don't manage a single thing

We handle the API costs

All data source connections and model usage are managed on our side — no subscriptions or API bills.

Custom integrations included

We connect the agent to your tools — Shopify, HubSpot, Google Sheets, Meta Ads, Stripe, and more.

Hosted & monitored for you

It runs on our infrastructure on your chosen schedule, with monitoring to catch any data issues.

Built around your workflow

Reports are structured and formatted the way your team already works — not a generic template.

FAQ

Common questions

What is an AI data entry and reporting agent?

It's an AI agent that connects to your business tools, pulls data on a schedule, cleans and structures it, and generates formatted reports automatically — delivering them to your inbox, Slack, or Google Drive without manual work.

Which tools can it connect to?

We can connect it to most business tools: CRMs like HubSpot and Salesforce, e-commerce platforms like Shopify, ad platforms like Meta and Google Ads, payment tools like Stripe, spreadsheets, and more. We handle all the integrations.

Can it replace manual data entry?

Yes, for structured, repetitive data work. If your team currently copies data from forms, emails, or one platform into another, this agent can handle that automatically — including cleaning and formatting the data before it lands.

What do the reports look like?

We build them around your existing reporting format — weekly summaries, client-ready dashboards, KPI trackers. The output is a formatted document, spreadsheet, or message delivered wherever your team works.

How long does it take to go live?

Most data entry and reporting agents are live within days. After a short discovery call, we build, integrate, and deploy it for you — nothing to install on your side.

Do I need to manage API connections or data tools?

No. We manage all integrations, data source access, and model costs on our infrastructure. You get accurate reports delivered automatically — no technical setup required.

Ready for your own data entry & reporting agent?

Book a free 20-minute call. We'll tell you exactly what your agent can do and build it for you — API costs, integrations, and hosting included.
